targets.query:
from(bucket: "workload")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cman_workload" and r._field == "latency_ms" and r.status == "ok")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "mean")
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "workload")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cman_workload" and r._field == "latency_ms" and r.status == "ok")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "max")
  |> yield(name: "max")

panels.title: Requests per RAC node (watch the flip on drain)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "workload")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cman_workload" and r._field == "latency_ms" and r.status == "ok")
  |> group(columns: ["inst"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "count")

from(bucket: "workload")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cman_workload" and r._field == "latency_ms" and r.status == "error")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "errors")
  |> yield(name: "errors")

from(bucket: "workload")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cman_workload" and r._field == "latency_ms" and r.status == "error")
  |> count()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "errors")
  |> yield(name: "errors")
